k001.name: Kyrillos
k001.message: We are overjoyed to have you celebrate this special day with us. Your presence means the world to us!

s002.name: Selvana
s002.message: Your warmth and love have always been a blessing. We can't wait to share this joyful moment with you.

f003.name: Peter
f003.message: It means so much to have you with us on this special day!

default.name: Dear Friend
default.message: We joyfully invite you to share in the celebration of our wedding day. Your presence is our greatest gift.
